goals.title: M2 P1 dispatch + compliance

goals.evidence: M2 code-complete at main 2347285. T2.1 consent wiring subsumed by T2.2 (compliance REST + consent ledger CSV export). T2.2 위치정보법 consent UI x3 (always-visible non-refusable GPS off-switch, on-duty-only collection, per-employee capture, withdrawal->T0.11 destruction) merged+lead-verified (compliance_api 4/4 incl. withdrawal-destroys-pings; red-green). T2.4 dispatch P1 broadcast-accept FSM (BROADCASTING/AUTO_ASSIGNED/MANAGER_FORCE_PENDING) + GPS x priority scoring + >=2-accept auto-assign + escalation timers (apalis) + Alimtalk adapter; E2E sim proven (two_accepts_auto_assign_best_gps_candidate, no_accept_path_escalates_and_manager_force_assigns, expire_accept_window, force_assign, timer_worker_delivers_alimtalk_and_manager_force_push). T2.5 escalation chain config-driven, skips un-templated Alimtalk -> 관리자 유선 gracefully. T2.3 KCC LBS 신고 + T2.6 Alimtalk template pre-approval are operator/business actions (GO-LIVE-CHECKLIST sec2/sec6); code is ready and degrades safely until they land.

T3.2 platform-realtime per-connection mpsc + LISTEN/NOTIFY IDs-only bridge (two-instance fan-out proven, <8000B ceiling asserted, body re-read from Postgres by ID). goals.title: M4 Reporting + KPI
goals.objective: Complete M4 tasks: 일일업무진행현황 golden-file Excel export byte-fidelity, 업무일지 auto-generation, KPI 표준 7종 with golden datasets, wall-board kiosk mode
goals.evidence: M4 complete. T4.1 umya-spreadsheet 3.0.0 template-fill engine (golden-file). T4.2 일일업무진행현황 export (실적/계획/미결누적/정기검사 sections, Priority#N warning col) byte-faithful to docs/reference. T4.3 업무일지 auto-generation (전일실적/금일예정 + 순회점검 + 긴급조치 + monthly calendar; editable before manager confirm). T4.4 KPI 표준 7종 on approval-timestamp basis with KpiExclusion (golden-dataset per metric). T4.5 executive dashboard (technician->branch->region->company rollups) + wall-board kiosk. Finding #6 (nullable branch_id rollup) RESOLVED-AS-INTENDED with regression test.

goals.title: M5 Registry economics
goals.objective: Complete M5 tasks: substitute-equipment matching, rental quote engine (negative 잔존가 handled), cost ledger with 잔존가 recompute, purchase/expenditure approval chain
goals.evidence: M5 complete. T5.1 substitute matching (/api/v1/equipment/{id}/substitutes; ton/규격 입식·좌식/동력 + location/status ranking via rank_substitute_candidates/match_priority; active-reservation lifecycle, migration 0014). T5.2 rental quote (configurable 취득가/잔존가/감가상각 정액·정률/수선비 이력/관리비율/이윤율 -> itemized; negative 잔존가 floored at persistence with residual_was_floored, real current_residual preserved for audit -- harden-2 #5 red-green). T5.3 정비비용 집행 -> equipment_cost_ledger -> 잔존가 recompute (concurrent serialized equipment lock). T5.4 purchase workflow FSM (거래명세표 첨부->구매요청서->admin 승인->지출결의서->thresholded 임원 승인->집행; each step role-gated+audited).

goals.title: M6 Seams + launch hardening
goals.objective: Complete M6 tasks: oyatie AI port + Bitween identity port (definitions only, no mocks), security review, load test, backup/restore + DR drills with evidence logs, pilot readiness for HQ team of 8
goals.evidence: M6 complete at main 8ce00fc. T6.1 AiAssistantPort (oyatie seam, no adapter). T6.2 IdentityProviderPort (Bitween seam; local identity is the real impl). T6.3 docs/CI-GATES.md (13-gate reference). T6.4 inspection domain (RegularInspectionSchedule + rounds -> 정기검사 export + 순회점검 diary). T6.5 docs/GO-LIVE-CHECKLIST.md. Pipeline review->harden->fix DONE: adversarial security + correctness/concurrency reviews filed .omc/review/; all 7 confirmed findings fixed+lead-verified (2 security ffc8081 incl. passkey-replay atomicity red-green + audit-gate path binding; 5 correctness 258f622 incl. /sync payload-bind, /sync crash-recovery, WORM post-completion REST guard + DB trigger, P1 alert exactly-once lease, negative-residual flooring -- red-green on the WORM and residual fixes); finding #6 RESOLVED-AS-INTENDED. DR backup/restore + PITR + VM-down drills evidenced (docs/evidence/). Workspace: 159 suites / 240 tests / 0 failed; 4 gates PASS; clippy -D warnings clean; migrations 0001-0019; tri-client drift clean; web/Android/iOS build+test green.

goals.title: Rollout
goals.objective: Pilot HQ 8명 on production, then branch waves 수도권→충청→영남→호남, each gated on seeded branch data, KCC coverage, parity/CI green, backup drill, OTel dashboards, audit-access review
goals.blockedReason: Requires operator/business actions the build cannot perform: provision OCI Ampere A1 (PAYG needed for custom-image import, stays $0 within Always-Free) + production TLS + install prod secrets incl. MNT_COLDSTART_OTP as a CSPRNG value (deploy/SECRETS.md, docs/release/SECRETS.md); file KCC LBS 사업 신고; submit + get approval for Kakao Alimtalk templates; seed branch/region topology + pilot user roster; distribute a signed pilot build; run the backup/restore drill on the real VM. Engineering is complete AND the deployment is now automated: deploy/ ships a GitOps Kubernetes path (single-node Talos on OCI Always-Free ap-chuncheon-1 + Argo CD/Rollouts blue-green + CloudNativePG PITR + cert-manager/Traefik) with bootstrap runbooks, alongside the CI supply chain (signed/SBOM/scanned multi-arch images) and a completed repo-wide security/quality/perf audit remediation. G001-G007 remain green post-remediation (170 suites/302 tests/0 failed, 4 gates PASS, client-drift clean). The remaining work is purely operator execution; see docs/GO-LIVE-CHECKLIST.md. Unblock by providing production access + completing the business filings, then resume.

claudeObjective: Complete all ultragoal stories in .omc/ultragoal/goals.json: G001-m0-platform-spine M0 Platform spine; G002-m1-registry-wo-core-slice M1 Registry + WO core slice; G003-m2-p1-dispatch-compliance M2 P1 dispatch + compliance; G004-m3-full-messenger M3 Full messenger; G005-m4-reporting-kpi M4 Reporting + KPI; G006-m5-registry-economics M5 Registry economics; G007-m6-seams-launch-hardening M6 Seams + launch hardening; G008-rollout Rollout
